user_query:
I’m juggling too many news updates. Please scan my local weekly digests and build a focused follow-up plan based on my watchlist. Use these inputs and produce two structured outputs:

Inputs:
- Config: input/watchlist.json
- Digests: all .txt files under input/news/ (recursive)

Selection rules:
- Treat each digest file as a sequence of items with fields exactly labeled: Date, Title, Tags, Body.
- Include an item only if BOTH of the following hold:
  1) Its Title or Body contains at least one string from watchlist.json "companies" OR at least one string from watchlist.json "topics" (case-insensitive, substring match).
  2) Its Tags field is exactly one of the keys in watchlist.json "follow_up_windows" (e.g., funding, partnership, product, hiring). Items with other tags are excluded even if they match companies/topics.
- Capture all matched companies and matched topics for each included item (case-insensitive; list each unique match once).
- Derive category from the Tags field (it will be a single tag). Compute priority using this fixed mapping: funding=1, partnership=2, product=3, hiring=4.

Outputs (create output/ if it doesn’t exist):
1) output/relevant.csv
   - Columns (in this order): date, title, category, priority, source_file, tags, matched_companies, matched_topics
   - date must be the item’s Date in YYYY-MM-DD as given; source_file is the relative path to the digest file where the item was found; tags is the original Tags string; matched_companies and matched_topics are semicolon-separated lists (empty if none).
   - Sort rows by date ascending, then title ascending.
2) output/followups.json
   - An array of reminder objects with fields: title, due_date, reason, source_title, source_date, source_file, category, priority
   - due_date is computed as item Date + N days, where N = watchlist.json.follow_up_windows[category]; format YYYY-MM-DD.
   - reason should be a short phrase like "Follow up on {category}".

Verification constraint:
- The number of reminders in output/followups.json must equal the number of rows in output/relevant.csv, and for every row there must be a reminder with matching source_title, source_date, and source_file.

Please do not access the internet or external tools. Work only with the provided files and directory. Make sure to read the config and inspect all .txt files under input/news/, extract relevant items, and write the two outputs exactly at the specified paths. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
